cards.name: Emberclaw Drake
cards.description: A dragon wreathed in eternal flame that scorches all it touches.
cards.flavorText: "Where it flies, the sky weeps cinders."

ability.name: Blaze Trail
ability.description: Deals 1 damage to all enemy Daemons on summon.

cards.name: Forge Sentinel
cards.description: A mechanical guardian powered by a molten furnace core.
cards.flavorText: "It knows neither mercy nor rust."

cards.name: Cindershade Wraith
cards.description: A burning spirit of vengeance that consumes its own Ashe to unleash devastating attacks.
cards.flavorText: "Even death cannot extinguish its rage."

ability.name: Immolate
ability.description: When destroyed, deals 3 damage to the enemy Conjuror.

cards.name: Volcanic Spitter
cards.description: A reptilian beast that hurls globs of molten rock from its maw.
cards.flavorText: "It never stops chewing. It never stops spitting."

cards.name: Ash Golem
cards.description: Formed from compacted volcanic ash, it crumbles and reforms endlessly.
cards.flavorText: "Bury it. It will only rise hotter."

ability.name: Cinder Cloud
ability.description: When destroyed, deals 2 damage to all enemy Daemons.

cards.name: Wildfire Fox
cards.description: A spectral fox that ignites the ground wherever it runs.
cards.flavorText: "Follow the burning pawprints—if you dare."

cards.name: Magma Forgemaster
cards.description: A colossal automaton that reshapes metal in its molten core.
cards.flavorText: "Every Daemon it destroys becomes raw material."

ability.name: Reforge
ability.description: Gains +1 ATK each time a Daemon is destroyed.

cards.name: Frostfang Serpent
cards.description: A serpent of living ice whose bite freezes enemies solid.
cards.flavorText: "Its coils can halt a river mid-flow."

ability.name: Frostbite
ability.description: Freezes target Daemon for 1 turn when attacking.

cards.name: Glacier Golem
cards.description: A massive construct of ancient glacial ice, nearly indestructible.
cards.flavorText: "It has stood since before the first thaw."

cards.name: Phantom Frost
cards.description: A ghostly presence that chills the soul and freezes the body.
cards.flavorText: "You won't see it coming. You'll only feel the cold."

ability.name: Glacial Veil
ability.description: Cannot be targeted by Seals.

cards.name: Rime Stalker
cards.description: A frozen corpse that prowls the tundra, patient and relentless.
cards.flavorText: "It waited a thousand years. It can wait one more turn."

cards.name: Avalanche Wurm
cards.description: A massive burrowing creature that triggers devastating ice slides.
cards.flavorText: "The mountain did not collapse. It was pushed."

ability.name: Landslide
ability.description: Deals 2 damage to a random enemy Daemon on summon.

cards.name: Hailstone Crab
cards.description: An armored crustacean encased in layers of permafrost plating.
cards.flavorText: "Its shell grows thicker with every storm."

cards.name: Blizzard Banshee
cards.description: A shrieking phantom whose wail brings a killing frost.
cards.flavorText: "When it screams, even fire flinches."

ability.name: Howling Gale
ability.description: Freezes the attacked Daemon for 1 turn.

cards.name: Tidecaller Leviathan
cards.description: An ancient sea beast that commands the tides themselves.
cards.flavorText: "When it surfaces, entire coastlines retreat."

ability.name: Tidal Surge
ability.description: Heals 2 Ashe at the start of your turn.

cards.name: Coral Automaton
cards.description: A living machine encrusted with deep-sea coral and barnacles.
cards.flavorText: "Half drowned, half alive, entirely lethal."

cards.name: Drowned Revenant
cards.description: A waterlogged spirit that drags foes into the depths.
cards.flavorText: "The ocean remembers every soul it has claimed."

ability.name: Undertow
ability.description: When destroyed, return 1 card from your Ashe Pile to hand.

cards.name: Riptide Eel
cards.description: A crackling eel that rides the currents and strikes like lightning.
cards.flavorText: "The sea has teeth, and they are electric."

cards.name: Abyssal Kraken
cards.description: A legendary horror from the deepest ocean trenches.
cards.flavorText: "It does not hunt. It simply opens its reach."

ability.name: Deep Grasp
ability.description: Draw 1 card when this Daemon is summoned.

cards.name: Barnacle Drone
cards.description: A drone ship piloted by parasitic barnacles in perfect unison.
cards.flavorText: "The barnacles steer. The hull obeys."

cards.name: Monsoon Shaman
cards.description: A rain spirit that mends wounded allies with healing downpours.
cards.flavorText: "Where it walks, the wounded rise."

ability.name: Healing Rain
ability.description: Heals all your Daemons for 1 Ashe at start of turn.

cards.name: Stonecrest Titan
cards.description: A mountain fragment brought to life by ancient earth magic.
cards.flavorText: "It does not move quickly. It does not need to."

ability.name: Fortify
ability.description: Takes 1 less damage from all attacks.

cards.name: Root Weaver
cards.description: An ancient tree spirit whose roots crush and entangle.
cards.flavorText: "The forest floor is its domain and its weapon."

cards.name: Ironvein Golem
cards.description: A golem forged from living ore, growing stronger from the earth.
cards.flavorText: "It mines itself for ammunition."

ability.name: Ore Armor
ability.description: Gains +1 Ashe when any Daemon is destroyed.

cards.name: Quake Beetle
cards.description: A massive beetle whose steps crack the earth and topple walls.
cards.flavorText: "It does not dig through stone. Stone moves aside."

cards.name: Terracotta Warrior
cards.description: A clay soldier animated by ancient wards, nearly impervious to harm.
cards.flavorText: "It has guarded that door for ten thousand years and will guard it ten thousand more."

ability.name: Stone Skin
ability.description: Takes 1 less damage from all attacks.

cards.name: Mudslide Toad
cards.description: A mud spirit that rides a wall of sludge into battle.
cards.flavorText: "You hear it coming. You smell it first."

cards.name: Crystal Borer
cards.description: A drilling automaton tipped with razor-sharp crystal teeth.
cards.flavorText: "No stone can stop it. No Pillar can withstand it."

ability.name: Core Drill
ability.description: Deals double damage to Pillars.

cards.name: Stormwing Raptor
cards.description: A raptor that commands lightning and rides the storm.
cards.flavorText: "Thunder follows in its wake like a loyal hound."

ability.name: Swiftclaw
ability.description: Can attack the turn it is summoned.

cards.name: Zephyr Djinn
cards.description: A spirit of the four winds, elusive and unpredictable.
cards.flavorText: "Try to strike it—you'll only hit the breeze."

cards.name: Skyforge Eagle
cards.description: A mechanical raptor with razor-edged wings of tempered steel.
cards.flavorText: "Built to hunt what the wind cannot catch."

ability.name: Dive Bomb
ability.description: Deals double damage to Pillars.

cards.name: Gust Hawk
cards.description: A small but vicious bird that strikes faster than the eye can follow.
cards.flavorText: "Blink and you bleed."

cards.name: Thunderclap Monk
cards.description: A storm ascetic whose clap sunders the air itself.
cards.flavorText: "One palm. One sound. One silence."

ability.name: Shockwave
ability.description: Deals 2 damage to a random enemy Daemon on summon.

cards.name: Windmill Drake
cards.description: A mechanical dragon that harnesses wind to power its flight.
cards.flavorText: "It hums a tune of turbines and tailwinds."

cards.name: Cyclone Djinn
cards.description: A greater djinn that becomes the storm itself.
cards.flavorText: "You cannot fight the sky."

ability.name: Eye of the Storm
ability.description: Returns to hand instead of being destroyed (once per game).

cards.name: Radiant Phoenix
cards.description: A bird of pure divine light that rises from its own ashes.
cards.flavorText: "Destroy it and it returns. Brighter."

ability.name: Rebirth
ability.description: When destroyed, returns to the field with 4 Ashe (once per game).

cards.name: Prism Automaton
cards.description: A crystalline machine that refracts light into devastating beams.
cards.flavorText: "A single ray enters. A thousand razors exit."

cards.name: Dawn Herald
cards.description: A celestial being that heralds the morning star.
cards.flavorText: "In its presence, shadows simply cease to exist."

ability.name: Healing Light
ability.description: Heals your Conjuror for 2 HP on summon.

cards.name: Halo Sprite
cards.description: A tiny fae of concentrated starlight that darts across the field.
cards.flavorText: "It giggled. Then the shadow screamed."

cards.name: Solar Knight
cards.description: An armored construct powered by captured sunlight.
cards.flavorText: "At noon it is invincible. At midnight it merely endures."

ability.name: Solar Charge
ability.description: +2 ATK when your Conjuror has more than half HP.

cards.name: Beacon Turret
cards.description: A stationary light cannon that sweeps the field with searing beams.
cards.flavorText: "It does not move. Everything else does."

cards.name: Seraph of Reckoning
cards.description: A six-winged angel of judgment that descends on the wicked.
cards.flavorText: "Mercy was its first instinct. It learned a second."

ability.name: Divine Descent
ability.description: Heals your Conjuror for 3 HP on summon.

cards.name: Voidmaw Beast
cards.description: A creature from between dimensions that devours light itself.
cards.flavorText: "Stare into it, and you'll see nothing stare back."

ability.name: Void Drain
ability.description: Steals 1 Ashe from the target when attacking.

cards.name: Shadow Reaper
cards.description: An undead harvester that reaps the souls of the fallen.
cards.flavorText: "It counts every soul. Yours is next."

ability.name: Soul Reap
ability.description: Gains +1 ATK for each Daemon in your Ashe Pile.

cards.name: Null Construct
cards.description: A machine powered by dark matter, disrupting all nearby magic.
cards.flavorText: "It was built by no one. It serves nothing."

cards.name: Gloom Crawler
cards.description: A multilimbed horror that skitters through the spaces between shadows.
cards.flavorText: "Check under the bed. Now check the ceiling."

cards.name: Nightmare Stalker
cards.description: A predator that hunts through the dreams of its prey.
cards.flavorText: "You thought you were safe when you woke up. You were wrong."

ability.name: Dream Shroud
ability.description: Cannot be targeted while you have Seals set.

cards.name: Dusk Automaton
cards.description: A clockwork soldier that only activates when the sun sets.
cards.flavorText: "Tick. Tick. Tick. Silence."

cards.name: Abyssal Devourer
cards.description: A monstrous entity from the deepest void that swallows all it touches.
cards.flavorText: "It does not consume to feed. It consumes to erase."

ability.name: Oblivion
ability.description: When destroyed, the opponent discards 1 random card.

cards.name: Vine Serpent
cards.description: A massive serpent of living vines that coils around its prey, squeezing the fight from them.
cards.flavorText: "It does not strike. It simply holds, and holds, and holds."

cards.name: Thorn Pixie
cards.description: A tiny fae wreathed in thorns that delights in drawing blood from careless hands.
cards.flavorText: "Don't. Touch. The flowers."

ability.name: Quick Paws
ability.description: Can attack the turn it is summoned.

cards.name: Mushroom Sentry
cards.description: A living fungal construct that absorbs blows and releases healing spores.
cards.flavorText: "Hit it harder. It only grows."

ability.name: Fortify
ability.description: Reduces incoming damage by 1.

cards.name: Elderwood Treant
cards.description: An ancient tree given will, it heals itself each turn, outlasting all who challenge it.
cards.flavorText: "Centuries pass. It remains."

ability.name: Deep Roots
ability.description: Regenerates 2 Ashe at the start of your turn.

cards.name: Blossom Shaman
cards.description: A druidic healer who calls upon the forest to mend wounds and restore life.
cards.flavorText: "Breathe. The forest gives."

ability.name: Bloom
ability.description: Heals your Conjuror for 3 HP on summon.

cards.name: Verdant Hydra
cards.description: A multi-headed plant beast that regrows stronger with every wound.
cards.flavorText: "Cut one head, and two more bloom."

ability.name: Rebirth
ability.description: When destroyed, returns to the field with 4 Ashe (once per game).

cards.name: Mycelium Network
cards.description: A vast underground fungal intelligence that strengthens every living thing connected to it.
cards.flavorText: "Beneath the soil, all things are one."

ability.name: Symbiosis
ability.description: When destroyed, all your Daemons heal 3 Ashe.

cards.name: Fenrir, the Great White Wolf
cards.description: A colossal white wolf spirit of ancient legend. Those who earn its loyalty are forever protected. Those who face it are never seen again.
cards.flavorText: "He was the best of us. The pack remembers." — In honor of Jeff

ability.name: Undying Pack
ability.description: When Fenrir is destroyed, all your other Daemons gain +2 ATK and heal 3 Ashe. He fights on through them.

cards.name: Fledgling Fox
cards.description: A young fox kit with a spark in its eyes and fire at its heels. Small but quick — what it lacks in power, it makes up for in heart.
cards.flavorText: "Every legend starts somewhere."

ability.name: Quick Paws
ability.description: Can attack the turn it is summoned.

cards.name: The Grey Fox
cards.description: A phantom fox that moves between shadows, striking from angles that shouldn't exist. It cannot be cornered, only respected.
cards.flavorText: "You won't catch me. But I'll find you."

ability.name: Shadow Step
ability.description: Cannot be targeted by Seals. When The Grey Fox attacks, it cannot take counter-damage.

cards.name: Pillar of the Blazing Sun
cards.description: Scorches all enemies each turn. Activate to unleash fiery punishment.
cards.passiveAbility: Deal 1 damage to all enemy Daemons at the start of your turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Flare
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 2 damage to a random enemy Daemon.

activatedAbilities.name: Solar Burst
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 4 damage to all enemy Daemons.

cards.name: Pillar of Infernal Gates
cards.description: Empowers all Flame Daemons. Channel its fury for devastating strikes.

activatedAbilities.name: Ignite
activatedAbilities.description: Your Flame Daemons gain +1 ATK permanently.

activatedAbilities.name: Hellgate
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 6 damage to the enemy Conjuror.

cards.name: Pillar of the Frozen Throne
cards.description: Empowers Ice Daemons. Activate to freeze the battlefield.

activatedAbilities.name: Frostbite
activatedAbilities.description: Freeze a random enemy Daemon.

activatedAbilities.name: Glacial Prison
activatedAbilities.description: Freeze ALL enemy Daemons for 1 turn.

cards.name: Pillar of Eternal Winter
cards.description: Makes enemies pay more to attack. Tap into deeper cold.
cards.passiveAbility: Enemy Daemons cost +1 Ashe to attack.

activatedAbilities.name: Chill
activatedAbilities.description: Enemy Daemons cost +1 Ashe to attack this turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Permafrost
activatedAbilities.description: Freeze 2 enemy Daemons and deal 2 damage to each.

cards.name: Pillar of the Abyss
cards.description: Regenerates your Water Daemons. The deep sea provides.
cards.passiveAbility: Your Water Daemons regenerate 1 Ashe per turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Tidal Heal
activatedAbilities.description: Heal all your Daemons for 2 Ashe.

activatedAbilities.name: Whirlpool
activatedAbilities.description: Return 2 cards from your Ashe Pile to hand.

cards.name: Pillar of the Tidal Crown
cards.description: Heals the Conjuror each turn. Channel to refresh and recycle.
cards.passiveAbility: Heal your Conjuror 1 HP at start of turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Blessing
activatedAbilities.description: Heal your Conjuror for 3 HP.

activatedAbilities.name: Tidal Surge
activatedAbilities.description: Draw 3 cards and heal Conjuror for 5 HP.

cards.name: Pillar of the World Tree
cards.description: Grants all your Daemons extra durability. The deepest roots hold.

activatedAbilities.name: Fortify
activatedAbilities.description: All your Daemons gain +1 max Ashe.

activatedAbilities.name: Tectonic
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 3 damage to all Daemons. Yours take 1 less.

cards.name: Pillar of the Iron Mountain
cards.description: The toughest Pillar in the game. Unyielding.

activatedAbilities.name: Reinforce
activatedAbilities.description: This Pillar gains +3 HP.

activatedAbilities.name: Avalanche
activatedAbilities.description: Destroy weakest enemy Daemon. Summon a 4/4 Golem.

cards.name: Pillar of the Storm's Eye
cards.description: Grants extra card draws. Speed and tempo embodied.
cards.passiveAbility: Draw an extra card every other turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Gust
activatedAbilities.description: Draw 1 card.

activatedAbilities.name: Tempest
activatedAbilities.description: Draw 3 cards. Your Daemons can attack again.

cards.name: Pillar of the Celestial Wind
cards.description: Sharpens your Air Daemons. Channel for lightning strikes.

activatedAbilities.name: Zephyr
activatedAbilities.description: Give 1 Daemon haste (can attack this turn).

activatedAbilities.name: Thunder Strike
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 5 damage to a single target (Daemon or Pillar).

cards.name: Pillar of Divine Radiance
cards.description: Heals your Conjuror with divine light. Channel to purify.
cards.passiveAbility: Heal your Conjuror 1 HP at start of turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Radiance
activatedAbilities.description: Heal your Conjuror for 2 HP.

activatedAbilities.name: Purify
activatedAbilities.description: Remove all Masks and Seals from the field.

cards.name: Pillar of the Morning Star
cards.description: Radiates power to your Light Daemons. Unleash judgment.

activatedAbilities.name: Illuminate
activatedAbilities.description: Reveal a random card from opponent's hand.

activatedAbilities.name: Judgment
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 4 damage to all enemy Daemons.

cards.name: Pillar of the Void
cards.description: Increases the cost for enemies to attack. The void consumes.
cards.passiveAbility: Enemy Daemons cost +1 Ashe to attack.

activatedAbilities.name: Siphon
activatedAbilities.description: Steal 2 Ashe from an enemy Daemon.

activatedAbilities.name: Void Rift
activatedAbilities.description: Destroy the weakest enemy Daemon. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Pillar of Endless Night
cards.description: Empowers your Dark Daemons. Feed the darkness.

activatedAbilities.name: Corrupt
activatedAbilities.description: Reduce an enemy Daemon's ATK by 2.

activatedAbilities.name: Eclipse
activatedAbilities.description: All enemy Daemons lose 3 Ashe. You draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Pillar of the Ancient Grove
cards.description: The Grove's roots run deep, granting extra life to all Daemons.
cards.passiveAbility: All your Daemons gain +2 max Ashe.

activatedAbilities.name: Nourish
activatedAbilities.description: Heal all your Daemons for 2 Ashe.

activatedAbilities.name: Overgrowth
activatedAbilities.description: Summon a 3/3 Treant token. Entangle 1 enemy.

cards.name: Pillar of the Verdant Canopy
cards.description: The canopy's embrace empowers your Nature Daemons.

activatedAbilities.name: Bloom
activatedAbilities.description: Your Nature Daemons gain +1 ATK permanently.

activatedAbilities.name: Genesis
activatedAbilities.description: Heal Conjuror for 5 HP. All your Daemons gain +2 Ashe.

cards.name: Pillar of the Iron Forge
cards.description: The forge never sleeps. Your machines grow stronger.

activatedAbilities.name: Overclock
activatedAbilities.description: All Machine Daemons gain +1 ATK permanently.

activatedAbilities.name: Mass Production
activatedAbilities.description: Summon a 3/3 Automaton token. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Pillar of the Cogwork Engine
cards.description: A perpetual engine powering all mechanical constructs.

activatedAbilities.name: Repair
activatedAbilities.description: Heal all Machine Daemons for 3 Ashe.

activatedAbilities.name: Overload
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 5 damage to all enemy Daemons.

cards.name: Pillar of the Architect
cards.description: The Architect designs perfection into every construct.

activatedAbilities.name: Blueprint
activatedAbilities.description: Draw 2 cards.

activatedAbilities.name: Masterwork
activatedAbilities.description: All Artificial Daemons gain +2 ATK and +2 Ashe permanently.

cards.name: Pillar of the Living Gallery
cards.description: Constructs animated by ancient craft move with purpose.
cards.passiveAbility: Artificial Daemons regenerate 1 Ashe per turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Animate
activatedAbilities.description: Summon a 2/4 Construct token.

activatedAbilities.name: Grand Design
activatedAbilities.description: Destroy weakest enemy. All your Daemons heal 3.

cards.name: Pillar of the Ethereal Gate
cards.description: The gate between worlds channels spectral energy.

activatedAbilities.name: Haunting
activatedAbilities.description: Freeze a random enemy Daemon.

activatedAbilities.name: Spirit Walk
activatedAbilities.description: All your Daemons gain stealth for 1 turn. Draw 1.

cards.name: Pillar of the Ancestral Veil
cards.description: Whispers of ancestors guide your spirit companions.
cards.passiveAbility: Spirit Daemons regenerate 1 Ashe per turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Commune
activatedAbilities.description: Return 1 card from Ashe Pile to hand.

activatedAbilities.name: Possession
activatedAbilities.description: Take control: reduce all enemy ATK by 2. Steal 1 card.

cards.name: Pillar of the Bone Throne
cards.description: Death is only the beginning. The bone throne rules eternal.

activatedAbilities.name: Raise Dead
activatedAbilities.description: Return 1 Daemon from Ashe Pile to field with 3 Ashe.

activatedAbilities.name: Death Wave
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 3 damage to ALL Daemons. Yours heal 2 after.

cards.name: Pillar of the Plague Crypt
cards.description: Plague and rot spread from this cursed crypt.
cards.passiveAbility: Enemy Daemons lose 1 Ashe at start of your turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Infect
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 2 damage to all enemy Daemons.

activatedAbilities.name: Pandemic
activatedAbilities.description: Destroy all enemy Daemons with 3 or less Ashe.

cards.name: Pillar of the Primal Storm
cards.description: Raw elemental force made manifest.

activatedAbilities.name: Channel
activatedAbilities.description: All Elemental Daemons gain +1 ATK permanently.

activatedAbilities.name: Primal Fury
activatedAbilities.description: Deal 3 damage to all enemies. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Pillar of the Convergence
cards.description: Where all elements converge, power is limitless.
cards.passiveAbility: Elemental Daemons regenerate 1 Ashe per turn.

activatedAbilities.name: Harmonize
activatedAbilities.description: Heal all your Daemons for 2 Ashe.

activatedAbilities.name: Elemental Surge
activatedAbilities.description: All your Daemons gain +2 ATK and can attack again.

cards.name: Mana Surge
cards.description: All Daemons on both sides gain +1 ATK.

cards.name: Ashe Storm
cards.description: All Daemons lose 2 Ashe at the end of each turn.

cards.name: Sanctuary
cards.description: No Daemons can be destroyed by combat this turn.

cards.name: Elemental Convergence
cards.description: Daemons matching their controller's primary element gain +2 ATK.

cards.name: Dimensional Rift
cards.description: Both players draw an extra card at the start of their turn.

cards.name: Pillar of Rebirth
cards.description: Restore a destroyed Pillar to full HP. Instant — does not replace the active Domain.
cards.flavorText: "The stone remembers what it was."

cards.name: Bastion Mending
cards.description: Heal all surviving Pillars for 4 HP. Instant — does not replace the active Domain.
cards.flavorText: "The cracks fill with golden light."

cards.name: Mask of Fury
cards.description: Equipped Daemon gains +3 ATK for 2 turns.

cards.name: Mask of Iron
cards.description: Equipped Daemon gains +5 Ashe for 3 turns.

cards.name: Mask of Haste
cards.description: Equipped Daemon can attack immediately. Lasts 1 turn.

cards.name: Mask of Shadows
cards.description: Equipped Daemon cannot be targeted for 2 turns.

cards.name: Mask of Thorns
cards.description: Attackers take 2 damage when hitting this Daemon. Lasts 3 turns.

cards.name: Ashe Drain
cards.description: When opponent attacks, drain 3 Ashe from the attacker.

cards.name: Mirror Force
cards.description: When attacked, destroy the attacking Daemon.

cards.name: Elemental Barrier
cards.description: Negate the next attack and heal your Conjuror for 3 HP.

cards.name: Counter Bind
cards.description: Negate the next Domain or Mask card your opponent plays.

cards.name: Soul Harvest
cards.description: When any Daemon is destroyed, heal your Conjuror for 4 HP.

cards.name: Purifying Light
cards.description: Dissolve the active Domain and mend the damage it wrought. Heals your Conjuror for 3 HP.
cards.flavorText: "Where corruption festers, radiance cleanses."

cards.name: Sacred Severance
cards.description: Strip a Mask from an enemy Daemon and weaken all enemies. All enemy Daemons lose 1 ATK.
cards.flavorText: "The false skin peels away, and what remains is fragile."

cards.name: Seal Shatter
cards.description: Destroy an enemy Seal and release its energy as shrapnel. Deals 2 damage to all enemy Daemons.
cards.flavorText: "The trap shatters — but the shards still cut."

cards.name: Arcane Dissolution
cards.description: Erase any Domain, Mask, or Seal and drain the caster's reserves. Opponent loses 2 Will.
cards.flavorText: "Magic unmade is magic stolen."

cards.name: Divine Judgment
cards.description: Smite any enchantment and punish its caster. Deals 5 damage to the opponent's Conjuror.
cards.flavorText: "The light judges all equally — and finds you wanting."

cards.name: Null Tide
cards.description: Wash away an enchantment and read the currents. Draw 2 cards.
cards.flavorText: "The waters recede, leaving knowledge on the shore."

cards.name: Void Erasure
cards.description: Unmake an enchantment and pull a soul from the void. Return 1 card from your Ashe Pile to hand.
cards.flavorText: "What the void takes, the void can return — for a price."

cards.name: Pyralis, the Eternal Flame
cards.description: A conjuror wreathed in undying fire. Channels destruction into every spell.
cards.flavorText: "Burn brighter. Burn everything."

abilities.name: Stoke
abilities.description: All your Flame Daemons gain +1 ATK this turn.

abilities.name: Firestorm
abilities.description: Deal 2 damage to all enemy Daemons.

abilities.name: Inferno Ascension
abilities.description: Deal 8 damage to the enemy Conjuror.

cards.name: Crystalis, the Frozen Mind
cards.description: A conjuror whose cold logic freezes foes in their tracks.
cards.flavorText: "Patience is a weapon. The cold is its edge."

abilities.name: Flash Freeze
abilities.description: Freeze a random enemy Daemon.

abilities.name: Glacial Barrier
abilities.description: Your Conjuror gains 4 HP.

abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.description: Freeze ALL enemy Daemons for 2 turns.

cards.name: Tidecrest, Lord of Currents
cards.description: A conjuror who commands the tides to heal and sustain.
cards.flavorText: "The ocean provides. The ocean endures."

abilities.name: Healing Tide
abilities.description: Heal all your Daemons for 2 Ashe.

abilities.name: Riptide
abilities.description: Return 1 card from Ashe Pile to hand.

abilities.name: Tsunami
abilities.description: Destroy the weakest enemy Daemon and draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Terravex, the Living Mountain
cards.description: A conjuror who IS the land. Immovable. Indestructible.
cards.flavorText: "I am the ground you stand on. Kneel."

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.description: All your Daemons gain +2 max Ashe.

abilities.name: Earthquake
abilities.description: Deal 3 damage to all Daemons (yours take 1 less).

abilities.name: Tectonic Collapse
abilities.description: Destroy an enemy Pillar. Summon a 5/5 Golem token.

cards.name: Zephyria, Voice of Thunder
cards.description: A conjuror who strikes with the speed of lightning and the fury of storms.
cards.flavorText: "You cannot outrun the wind."

abilities.name: Tailwind
abilities.description: Draw 2 cards.

abilities.name: Chain Lightning
abilities.description: Deal 2 damage to 2 random enemies.

abilities.name: Eye of the Tempest
abilities.description: Take an extra battle phase this turn.

cards.name: Seraph Solara, the Radiant Judge
cards.description: A conjuror of divine light who heals the worthy and punishes the wicked.
cards.flavorText: "The light judges all. And finds you wanting."

abilities.name: Blessing
abilities.description: Heal your Conjuror for 3 HP.

abilities.name: Purge
abilities.description: Destroy all enemy Masks and Seals.

abilities.name: Divine Reckoning
abilities.description: Heal to full HP. All Daemons take 4 damage.

cards.name: Morvath, the Abyssal Lord
cards.description: A conjuror who feeds on destruction, growing stronger from every death.
cards.flavorText: "Every soul that falls feeds my hunger."

abilities.name: Drain
abilities.description: Steal 2 Ashe from an enemy Daemon.

abilities.name: Shadow Pact
abilities.description: Pay 3 HP to draw 3 cards and gain 2 Will.

abilities.name: Void Collapse
abilities.description: Destroy all Daemons. Gain +1 loyalty per destroy.

cards.name: Gaia, the World Soul
cards.description: The forest itself made manifest. Life and growth in overwhelming abundance.
cards.flavorText: "Where I walk, the world blooms."

abilities.name: Regrowth
abilities.description: Heal all your Daemons for 3 Ashe.

abilities.name: Entangle
abilities.description: Entangle 2 random enemy Daemons.

abilities.name: Genesis Wave
abilities.description: Summon 3 random Daemons from your deck to the field.

decks.name: Flamecaller's Arsenal
decks.description: Aggressive burn strategy — overwhelm enemies with relentless fire damage.

decks.name: Frostweaver's Grimoire
decks.description: Freeze and shatter — control the board and outlast your opponent.

decks.name: Tidebinder's Codex
decks.description: Heal and regenerate — wear down the enemy with relentless endurance.

decks.name: Stonewarden's Tome
decks.description: Immovable defense — massive Ashe pools and overwhelming resilience.

decks.name: Tempest Scrolls
decks.description: Speed and precision — strike fast, draw more, dominate tempo.

decks.name: Radiant Codex
decks.description: Divine protection — heal, dispel, and outlast with celestial might.

decks.name: Shadow Grimoire
decks.description: Sinister power — drain, destroy, and dominate through darkness.

decks.name: Verdant Chronicle
decks.description: Growth and resilience — heal, regenerate, and outlast everything.

decks.name: Primal Elements
decks.description: Raw elemental power — versatile daemons from every element.

decks.name: Cogwork Legion
decks.description: Mechanical precision — durable machines with devastating combos.

decks.name: Architect's Workshop
decks.description: Masterfully crafted constructs with unmatched resilience.

decks.name: Ethereal Conclave
decks.description: Spectral forces that phase through defenses and haunt the enemy.

decks.name: Grave Pact
decks.description: Death fuels power — destroy and resurrect in an endless cycle.

decks.name: Apprentice's Flame Kit
decks.description: A beginner-friendly deck with basic Flame daemons. Given by Professor Eluris.

decks.name: Apprentice's Water Kit
decks.description: A beginner-friendly deck with basic Water daemons. Given by Professor Eluris.

decks.name: Apprentice's Earth Kit
decks.description: A beginner-friendly deck with sturdy Earth daemons. Given by Professor Eluris.
